src: A sneaker with a thick sole and iridescent upper reflecting pink, blue, and yellow. It has white laces, a robust design, and a white sole with rugged texture.
edit: A rugged sneaker with a thick, weathered sole and sandstorm-hued upper in rusty brown, beige, and orange. It has dusty taupe laces and a resilient design. The sole is sun-scorched gray with a cracked surface.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The object is on a large rough stone outdoors, surrounded by greenery with small shrubs. A tall rock is in the background, and a city street with bicycles is visible on the left.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object is positioned on the edge of a concrete embankment next to water with gentle waves in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The object is on a paved surface with a rough texture, small pebbles and asphalt pieces scattered. The background is neutral without noticeable objects.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object is on lush green grass in an open space with evenly cut grass blades. No visible objects in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: the object is on an old, green wooden bench with visible cracks, surrounded by grass and a gravel path, suggesting a park or garden setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.05: the object is on speckled concrete against a red brick wall with worn, textured bricks and visible mortar lines, in an urban scene with no other buildings or objects.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: An object sits on a large stone in a harsh desert with skeletal plants and shrubs, a craggy rock in the background. A dusty street with abandoned bicycles is on the left, under the sun's orange glow casting long shadows.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object is on the edge of a dusty desert embankment, cracked and orange under the sun. A dried-up water body reflects a barren landscape with distant mirages. Dusty winds swirl, creating a post-apocalyptic desert vibe.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object sits on a desert landscape with a cracked surface and sand-dusted debris. Surrounding it are shards of rusted metal and faded rubber, in a barren background with a copper-hued sky, resembling a Mad-Max-desert style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The object is on arid, sun-scorched earth with cracked ground, surrounded by sparse jagged grass blades in a barren desertscape, reflecting a Mad-Max style. Dust swirls in the air, emphasizing the harsh environment.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: A dilapidated rusted bench stands in a harsh desert, surrounded by cracked earth and dusty pebbles, in a post-apocalyptic desert landscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.05: An object is on a cracked, dusty ground of a post-apocalyptic desert, against a dilapidated, sun-blasted brick wall with scorched bricks and faded mortar lines in a Mad-Max-desert landscape.
